name: ASRock IMB-X1317-10G Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA1851 - Intel W880 Chipset - Supports DDR5 6400MHz - 1x PCIe x16 (Gen5) - 1x PCIe x8 (Gen5) - 2x USB4/Thunderbolt4 - 3x Intel GbE LAN - 1x Intel 2.5G LAN - 1x Marvell 10G LAN - HDMI 2.1 (IMB-X1317-10G)
shortName: ASRock IMB-X1317-10G Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA1851 - Intel
description: Industrial Micro-ATX motherboard with LGA1851 socket, Intel W880 chipset, and 10G LAN for professional workstations.
